nuggets.description: Andre introduces the 'Path to the Desert' daily program, moving toward a 30-day discipline. The core mechanic is 'Thank God reps'—specifically 300 per day—to rewire the brain from anxiety to gratitude and loyalty to God.

Andre frames recovery from a breakup as a spiritual process of 'cutting soul ties' and realigning loyalty. He explains that recurring painful thoughts are opportunities for gratitude, not reasons for self-condemnation.
Andre provides a practical compass for evaluating thoughts: 'Does this thought have me trust God more and draw me closer to him... or does it have me trust God less and separate me from him?'

action_items.task: Start Path of the Desert Day 1.
Set up automated gratitude reminders at 7, 10, 1, 4, and 7.
